risks.notes: Run 14 (2026-05-22): NEW. Stage iCore→Betler cutover date (2026-08-10) is soft — pending refinement with Comtrade and release management. Downstream impact on regression and bug-fix testing window. Slack-only, score=3.

risks.title: PLAYER-1070 — dual blocker dependency (PLAYER-1013 + PLAYER-1000), Jun-30 deadline
risks.notes: Run 14 (2026-05-22): NEW. PLAYER-1070 In Delivery, blocked by both PLAYER-1013 and PLAYER-1000. Jun 30 deadline = 39d. Note: PLAYER-1013 is itself blocked by PLAYER-1000, creating a chain. base=4×1.25(39d)=5. Jira-only.

risks.title: PLAYER-888 — Card payment non-prod not configured for Romania, regression testing blocked

slack_threads.summary: 22 May regression testing: Non-prod card setup for Romania not done — team was focused on Greece and checkout rollout. Card deposits blocked; iframe flow working as alternative. Developers triaging configuration issue. Regression testing proceeding with alternative payment methods only.

risks.notes: Run 14 (2026-05-22): NEW. Card payment non-prod environment config not done for Romania — team focused on Greece/checkout. Blocking full card regression testing. Iframe flow used as workaround. Separate from RR-009 (V1/V2 sunset, Closed). Slack-only, score=4.

risks.title: Virtual Sports accidental push to RO production — open 5+ months, no owner
risks.notes: Run 14 (2026-05-22): NEW. Player Escalation/Risks DB: 'Possible accidental push of Virtual Sports to RO prod' — Status: Not started, Probability: Low, Impact: High.
